content:
Open source AI has entered a new era. Just a few years ago, if you wanted access to a state of the art language model, you had only one option: pay for an API. Today, the landscape looks completely different. Open source large language models can now write production quality code, solve graduate level mathematics, power autonomous AI agents, analyze millions of words of text, and even compete with proprietary models on many industry benchmarks.

5 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Image generated using AIThe best part? Many of them can run locally on consumer hardware, giving developers complete control over privacy, customization, and deployment costs.
But with dozens of new models released every month, choosing the right one has become increasingly difficult. Some models excel at programming, while others specialize in reasoning, multilingual understanding, or long context processing.
This article ranks the 10 best open source LLMs available in July 2026 based on official benchmark results, real world performance, community…
